_doc: Reproducibility manifest for global opencode skills. Each entry declares how to install. v2 adds 'method' field; v1 entries auto-migrate to method=symlink.

method.notes: Installs SKILL to ~/.config/opencode/skills/graphify/ and a hook plugin in CWD/.opencode/plugins/. We move the plugin to ~/.config/opencode/plugins/ for global activation and remove .opencode/ from CWD.

method.install_cmd: bash install.sh --target opencode --profile developer && bash install.sh --target opencode --with framework:laravel && bash install.sh --target opencode --skills laravel-patterns,laravel-tdd,laravel-verification,laravel-plugin-discovery
method.post_install_move: mv ~/.opencode/* ~/.config/opencode/ (item by item; rename package.json -> package-ecc.json, node_modules -> node_modules-ecc, opencode.json -> opencode-ecc.json)
method.merge_required: opencode-ecc.json must be hand-merged into opencode.jsonc (curated: 12 cross-stack agents + 11 cross-stack commands)
method.notes: ECC installer is hardcoded to ~/.opencode/. Manual relocation needed because opencode 1.15.10 only reads ~/.config/opencode/.

Not a real skill repo — curated catalog of 71 brand/product design.md files under design-md/<brand>/design.md. We clone the repo and ship a wrapper SKILL.md (in this kit's source) that teaches the agent how to consult the catalog when designing UI.

method.install_dir: ~/.config/opencode/ (commands singular dir, agents plural dir, get-shit-done/ runtime, hooks/, skills/, plugins/superpowers.js)
method.known_issues: Installer reports 161 unreplaced .claude/ refs across 30 files (Claude-Code-only commands: cost-report, multi-backend, hookify, prp-*, sessions — non-functional in opencode standalone). 16 GSD agents have .claude/skills/ fallback refs that are harmless.
method.notes: Successor of archived gsd-build/get-shit-done. Profile=full installs 67 commands + ~33 agents + bundled hooks + SDK symlink at ~/.local/bin/gsd-sdk.

method.install_cmd: mkdir -p /tmp/uipro-probe && cd /tmp/uipro-probe && npx --yes uipro-cli@latest init --ai opencode --force
method.notes: uipro-cli has no --global flag — installs to <cwd>/.opencode/skills/ui-ux-pro-max. We run it in a tmp sandbox and relocate the skill dir to ~/.config/opencode/skills/. SKILL.md is registered as 'ui-ux-pro-max' (not 'uipro').
